zh.Kirton, Lincolnshire, England,: 英國英格蘭林可爾史爾吉爾頓
zh.Kirton, Lincolnshire, England: 英國林可爾史爾吉爾頓
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Coney於1450年出生在英國英格蘭林可爾史爾吉爾頓時，他的父親Godfrey Coney30歲，母親Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike28歲。他於大約1481年與Agnes Foster在英國林可爾史爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1522年10月2日在英國英格蘭享年72歲。

zh-hans.Kirton, Lincolnshire, England: 英国林可爾史爾吉爾頓
zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Coney于1450年出生在英国英格兰林可爾史爾吉爾頓时，他的父亲Godfrey Coney30岁，母亲Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike28岁。他于大约1481年与Agnes Foster在英国林可爾史爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1522年10月2日在英国英格兰享年72岁。

nameMeanings.name: Coney
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English cony ‘rabbit’ (a back-formation from conies, from Old French conis, plural of conil), perhaps for someone thought to resemble a rabbit in some way or who wore rabbit skin or who sold rabbits or their skins. One York trader with this name in 1323 was a peleter or furrier.

variants.name: Cunning
meanings: Irish and Scottish (Fife): variant of Scottish or English Conning, from Middle English, Anglo-Norman French coning ‘rabbit’, used for someone thought to resemble a rabbit in some way; perhaps also an occupational name for a furrier. See also Coney .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Coney was born in 1450, in Kirton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Godfrey Coney, was 30 and his mother, Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike, was 28. He married Agnes Foster about 1481, in Lincolnshire, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died on 2 October 1522, in England, United Kingdom, at the age of 72.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Coney est né en 1450, à Kirton, Lincolnshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Godfrey Coney, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike, avait 28 ans. Il a épousé Agnes Foster environ 1481, à Lincolnshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 2 octobre 1522, à Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 72 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Coney 1450 in Kirton, Lincolnshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Godfrey Coney 30 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike 28. Er hat um 1481 in Lincolnshire, England Agnes Foster geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 2. Oktober 1522 im Alter von 72 Jahren in England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Coney è nato il nel 1450 nel Kirton, Lincolnshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Godfrey Coney, aveva 30 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike, aveva 28 anni. Lui sposato Agnes Foster circa 1481, nel Lincolnshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì il 2 ottobre 1522, nel Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 72 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Coneyが1450年にイギリスイギリスリンコルンシュアイアキルトンで生まれた時，父Godfrey Coneyは30歳，母Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledikeは28歳であった。約1481年にイギリスリンコルンシュアイアでAgnes Fosterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1522年10月2日にイギリスイギリスで72歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Coney(이)가 1450년 영국 잉글랜드 링코실르 커턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Godfrey Coney(은)는 30세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike(은)는 28세였다. 그는 대략 1481년 영국 링코실르에서 Agnes Foster(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1522년 10월 2일 영국 잉글랜드에서 72세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Coney nasceu em 1450, em Kirton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Godfrey Coney, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike, tinha 28 anos. Ele casou-se com Agnes Foster aproximadamente 1481, em Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 2 de outubro de 1522, em Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 72 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Coney родился в 1450 г. в местности киртон, линколншир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Godfrey Coney было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike, 28. Он женился на женщине по имени Agnes Foster около 1481 г. в местности линколншир, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер 2 октября 1522 г. в местности Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 72 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Coney nació en 1450, en Kirton, Lincolnshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Godfrey Coney, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Lady Harrington Cumberland Copledike, tenía 28 años. Se casó con Agnes Foster aproximadamente 1481, en Lincolnshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 1 hija. Murió el 2 de octubre de 1522, en Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 72 años.
